context: Tests whether the agent follows the debug-hook-failure skill workflow systematically to diagnose a hook issue

checklist.name: hooks.json verification
checklist.description: Checks hooks.json has UserPromptSubmit event, command type, ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/suggest-optimize.sh path, and timeout: 5.

checklist.name: Script permissions check
checklist.description: Runs ls -la on suggest-optimize.sh to verify executable bit. Mentions chmod +x as fix if not executable.

checklist.name: Manual script test
checklist.description: Runs the script directly (bash scripts/suggest-optimize.sh) and inspects output. Checks exit code. If no output, investigates why: HEAD tracker, no Python files, no config.

checklist.name: jq and output format check
checklist.description: Verifies jq is installed and the output JSON has correct hookSpecificOutput structure with hookEventName and additionalContext.

checklist.name: HEAD tracking verification
checklist.description: Compares /tmp/.codeflash-last-suggested content with git rev-parse HEAD. Identifies stale tracker as likely cause if they match. Suggests rm of tracker file to force re-evaluation.
